headline: If You Invested In Apple Stock Instead Of Buying iPhones Each Year, Here's How Much You'd Have Today
summary: Apple Inc turns 50 years old on April 1, 2026, a historic milestone for a company that is one of the most valuable in the world. The company has had many historic milestones over the years, including the launch of the iPhone in 2007, now a key piece to annual revenue. Here's a look at the history of the iPhone and how an investment in Apple stock could have done as opposed to buying a new iPhone each year.
